isolation.cookieHandling: Captured each fixture user's exact set-cookie value from POST /api/auth/sign-in/email and reused the resulting cookie name=value pair explicitly in Cookie headers.
isolation.mutationBoundary: Only the assigned invite ids plus namespace-scoped temp invite emails (tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-api-owner-temp-007-20260406T101407Z@example.com, tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-mixed-owner-temp-007-20260406T101407Z@example.com) and the assigned bulk batch were mutated.

assertions.title: Invite acceptance joins and activates the invited workspace

steps.action: Sign in as apiRecipient and read GET /trpc/teamInvites.invitesByEmail plus GET /trpc/user.me without any accepted workspace.
steps.expected: The pending invite is readable even while the session is teamless, and user.me shows no activeTeam yet.
steps.observed: GET /trpc/teamInvites.invitesByEmail returned HTTP 200 with invite aa739873-4c71-420e-8911-5efb3834e5ab for team 32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802 (tenancy-ux-fedb5c00 API Owner Workspace); GET /trpc/user.me returned HTTP 200 with activeTeam null and needsOnboarding=True.

steps.action: POST /trpc/teamInvites.accept with inviteId aa739873-4c71-420e-8911-5efb3834e5ab as apiRecipient.
steps.expected: The invite is accepted and the invited workspace becomes active immediately.
steps.observed: POST /trpc/teamInvites.accept returned HTTP 200 with payload {"activeTeam": {"id": "32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802", "name": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00 API Owner Workspace", "logoUrl": null, "settings": {"baseCurrency": "KES", "countryCode": "KE", "fiscalYearStartMonth": null, "industryKey": "fashion", "industryConfigVersion": "v1"}}, "membership": {"role": "member", "teamId": "32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802"}, "needsOnboarding": false}.

steps.action: Re-read GET /trpc/user.me, GET /trpc/team.current, and GET /trpc/privateData using the same cookie.
steps.expected: All three surfaces resolve the API owner workspace as the now-active workspace.
steps.observed: GET /trpc/user.me returned HTTP 200 with activeTeam 32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802 (tenancy-ux-fedb5c00 API Owner Workspace); GET /trpc/team.current returned HTTP 200 with {"id": "32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802", "name": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00 API Owner Workspace", "logoUrl": null, "settings": {"baseCurrency": "KES", "countryCode": "KE", "fiscalYearStartMonth": null, "industryKey": "fashion", "industryConfigVersion": "v1"}}; GET /trpc/privateData returned HTTP 200 with activeTeam 32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802 (tenancy-ux-fedb5c00 API Owner Workspace).

evidence.network: POST /api/auth/sign-in/email -> 200; GET /trpc/teamInvites.invitesByEmail -> 200; GET /trpc/user.me -> 200 with activeTeam null; POST /trpc/teamInvites.accept -> 200; GET /trpc/user.me -> 200; GET /trpc/team.current -> 200; GET /trpc/privateData -> 200.

assertions.title: Invite acceptance can establish the first usable workspace without default-team bootstrap

steps.action: While signed in as apiRecipient before acceptance, read GET /trpc/user.me, GET /trpc/team.current, and GET /trpc/privateData.
steps.expected: The user should still be teamless: user.me/team.current show no active workspace and privateData rejects behind the onboarding boundary.
steps.observed: GET /trpc/user.me returned HTTP 200 with activeTeam null; GET /trpc/team.current returned HTTP 200 with body null; GET /trpc/privateData returned HTTP 403 with error "Complete onboarding before accessing this resource".

steps.action: Accept invite aa739873-4c71-420e-8911-5efb3834e5ab as that same teamless user.
steps.expected: The seeded API owner workspace becomes the first usable workspace immediately, without any separate default bootstrap team.
steps.observed: POST /trpc/teamInvites.accept returned HTTP 200 and resolved activeTeam.id 32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802 (tenancy-ux-fedb5c00 API Owner Workspace).

steps.action: Re-read GET /trpc/user.me, GET /trpc/team.current, and GET /trpc/privateData after acceptance.
steps.expected: All protected/current-team surfaces should now resolve the seeded API owner workspace as the first usable workspace.
steps.observed: user.me activeTeam.id=32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802, team.current.id=32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802, privateData activeTeam.id=32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802; all matched the seeded API owner workspace 32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802.

evidence.network: Before acceptance: GET /trpc/user.me -> 200, GET /trpc/team.current -> 200, GET /trpc/privateData -> 403; after POST /trpc/teamInvites.accept -> 200, the same session saw GET /trpc/user.me -> 200, GET /trpc/team.current -> 200, and GET /trpc/privateData -> 200 on team 32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802.

assertions.title: Owner-only invite management is enforced per active workspace

steps.action: Sign in as apiOwner on the active API owner workspace and call GET /trpc/teamInvites.list.
steps.expected: The active owner can list pending invites for that workspace.
steps.observed: GET /trpc/team.current returned HTTP 200 with team 32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802 (tenancy-ux-fedb5c00 API Owner Workspace); GET /trpc/teamInvites.list returned HTTP 200 with pending invites [{"id": "a989c4ee-0140-4c92-8357-5c7968e93223", "email": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-duplicate-pending@example.com", "status": "pending", "teamId": "32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802"}].

steps.action: As apiOwner, create then revoke a namespace-scoped temp invite (tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-api-owner-temp-007-20260406T101407Z@example.com).
steps.expected: Owner-scoped create and revoke both succeed on the active workspace.
steps.observed: POST /trpc/teamInvites.invite returned HTTP 200 with payload {"created": [{"id": "4979352f-7292-4ba2-ae4d-8b4a5a117d98", "teamId": "32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802", "email": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-api-owner-temp-007-20260406t101407z@example.com", "normalizedEmail": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-api-owner-temp-007-20260406t101407z@example.com", "role": "member", "status": "pending", "invitedByUserId": "Vj3XdZaIqlkw0V9IgV0ZIQiesZybqPud", "acceptedByUserId": null, "expiresAt": "2026-04-13T10:14:08.845Z", "acceptedAt": null, "createdAt": "2026-04-06T10:14:09.230Z", "updatedAt": "2026-04-06T10:14:09.230Z"}], "sent": 1, "skipped": 0, "skippedInvites": []}; POST /trpc/teamInvites.delete returned HTTP 200 with body {"result":{"data":{"id":"4979352f-7292-4ba2-ae4d-8b4a5a117d98","teamId":"32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802","email":"tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-api-owner-temp-007-20260406t101407z@example.com","normalizedEmail":"tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-api-owner-temp-007-20260406t101407z@example.com","role":"member","status":"revoked","invitedByUserId":"Vj3XdZaIqlkw0V9IgV0ZIQiesZybqPud","acceptedByUserId":null,"expiresAt":"2026-04-13T10:14:08.845Z","acceptedAt":null,"createdAt":"2026-04-06T10:14:09.230Z","updatedAt":"2026-04-06T10:14:09.904Z"}}}.

steps.action: Sign in as mixedRole while active on the API owner workspace and try owner-only list/create/delete there.
steps.expected: Because mixedRole is only a member on that workspace, all owner-scoped invite operations are rejected.
steps.observed: GET /trpc/team.current returned HTTP 200 with team 32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802 (tenancy-ux-fedb5c00 API Owner Workspace); GET /trpc/teamInvites.list -> HTTP 403 / "Owner permissions required", POST /trpc/teamInvites.invite -> HTTP 403 / "Owner permissions required", POST /trpc/teamInvites.delete -> HTTP 403 / "Owner permissions required".

steps.action: Switch mixedRole to membership 5fc29c90-1367-439e-a624-b479fe3d3f6c and retry owner-scoped invite list/create/delete on the owned workspace.
steps.expected: Once active on the owned workspace, owner-scoped invite operations succeed.
steps.observed: POST /trpc/user.switchTeam returned HTTP 200; GET /trpc/team.current then returned HTTP 200 with team 497fc4f9-811e-4a86-8f74-12f719801eaf (tenancy-ux-fedb5c00 Mixed Owner Workspace); GET /trpc/teamInvites.list returned HTTP 200, POST /trpc/teamInvites.invite returned HTTP 200 with payload {"created": [{"id": "e6344fbf-6a1f-4905-970a-0e6337f94d36", "teamId": "497fc4f9-811e-4a86-8f74-12f719801eaf", "email": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-mixed-owner-temp-007-20260406t101407z@example.com", "normalizedEmail": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-mixed-owner-temp-007-20260406t101407z@example.com", "role": "member", "status": "pending", "invitedByUserId": "ejehX3tElnnXAheQhBLSkmk8XzyP2T6K", "acceptedByUserId": null, "expiresAt": "2026-04-13T10:14:17.416Z", "acceptedAt": null, "createdAt": "2026-04-06T10:14:18.650Z", "updatedAt": "2026-04-06T10:14:18.650Z"}], "sent": 1, "skipped": 0, "skippedInvites": []}, and POST /trpc/teamInvites.delete returned HTTP 200.

commands: curl -sS -i --max-time 20 -X POST -H "Cookie: [apiOwner auth cookie]" -H "content-type: application/json" --data "[{"email":"<namespace temp email>","role":"member"}]" "http://api.faworra.localhost:1355/trpc/teamInvites.invite"

curl -sS -i --max-time 20 -X POST -H "Cookie: [apiOwner auth cookie]" -H "content-type: application/json" --data "{"inviteId":"<created invite id>"}" "http://api.faworra.localhost:1355/trpc/teamInvites.delete"
evidence.network: apiOwner: GET /trpc/teamInvites.list -> 200, POST /trpc/teamInvites.invite -> 200, POST /trpc/teamInvites.delete -> 200; mixedRole on API owner workspace: GET /trpc/teamInvites.list -> 403, POST /trpc/teamInvites.invite -> 403, POST /trpc/teamInvites.delete -> 403; after POST /trpc/user.switchTeam -> 200, mixedRole owned-workspace GET /trpc/teamInvites.list -> 200, POST /trpc/teamInvites.invite -> 200, POST /trpc/teamInvites.delete -> 200.

assertions.title: Accepted and invalid invites stop being actionable

steps.action: After apiRecipient accepted invite aa739873-4c71-420e-8911-5efb3834e5ab, re-read the recipient inbox and apiOwner pending invite list.
steps.expected: The accepted invite should no longer appear as a pending actionable invite for either the recipient or the owner.
steps.observed: GET /trpc/teamInvites.invitesByEmail as apiRecipient returned HTTP 200 with payload []; GET /trpc/teamInvites.list as apiOwner returned HTTP 200 with payload [{"id": "a989c4ee-0140-4c92-8357-5c7968e93223", "email": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-duplicate-pending@example.com", "status": "pending", "teamId": "32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802"}].

steps.action: Sign in as repeatRecipient and POST /trpc/teamInvites.accept again for the already accepted invite bc434cfa-da03-414b-af84-5127535581ac.
steps.expected: Same-user repeat accept is a safe idempotent restore/no-op that leaves the invited workspace active.
steps.observed: Before repeat accept, user.me activeTeam was {"id": "32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802", "name": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00 API Owner Workspace", "logoUrl": null, "settings": {"baseCurrency": "KES", "countryCode": "KE", "fiscalYearStartMonth": null, "industryKey": "fashion", "industryConfigVersion": "v1"}} and team.current was {"id": "32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802", "name": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00 API Owner Workspace", "logoUrl": null, "settings": {"baseCurrency": "KES", "countryCode": "KE", "fiscalYearStartMonth": null, "industryKey": "fashion", "industryConfigVersion": "v1"}}; POST /trpc/teamInvites.accept returned HTTP 200 with payload {"activeTeam": {"id": "32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802", "name": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00 API Owner Workspace", "logoUrl": null, "settings": {"baseCurrency": "KES", "countryCode": "KE", "fiscalYearStartMonth": null, "industryKey": "fashion", "industryConfigVersion": "v1"}}, "membership": {"role": "member", "teamId": "32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802"}, "needsOnboarding": false}; afterwards user.me/team.current/privateData all resolved team 32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802 (tenancy-ux-fedb5c00 API Owner Workspace).

steps.action: Sign in as outsider, capture current-team/privateData, then attempt the revoked, expired, and wrong-email invite accepts in sequence.
steps.expected: Each invalid invite action is rejected with its concrete payload and outsider remains on the same active workspace throughout.
steps.observed: Baseline GET /trpc/team.current -> HTTP 200 with {"id": "1efb51ea-495e-4d97-9247-18e699867bc2", "name": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00 Outsider Workspace", "logoUrl": null, "settings": {"baseCurrency": "CAD", "countryCode": "CA", "fiscalYearStartMonth": null, "industryKey": "fashion", "industryConfigVersion": "v1"}} and GET /trpc/privateData -> HTTP 200 with activeTeam {"id": "1efb51ea-495e-4d97-9247-18e699867bc2", "name": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00 Outsider Workspace", "logoUrl": null, "settings": {"baseCurrency": "CAD", "countryCode": "CA", "fiscalYearStartMonth": null, "industryKey": "fashion", "industryConfigVersion": "v1"}}. Then POST revoked -> HTTP 400 / "This invite has been revoked", POST expired -> HTTP 400 / "This invite has expired", POST wrong-email -> HTTP 403 / "This invite is for a different email address"; every follow-up team.current/privateData read stayed on 1efb51ea-495e-4d97-9247-18e699867bc2 (tenancy-ux-fedb5c00 Outsider Workspace).

evidence.network: apiRecipient inbox after acceptance -> 200; apiOwner pending list after acceptance -> 200; repeatRecipient POST /trpc/teamInvites.accept -> 200 then GET /trpc/user.me, /trpc/team.current, /trpc/privateData -> 200/200/200; outsider invalid accepts -> revoked 400, expired 400, wrong-email 403, with every follow-up /trpc/team.current and /trpc/privateData call returning 200 on the outsider workspace.

assertions.title: Bulk invite creation is partially successful and de-duplicates safely

steps.action: As apiOwner, POST /trpc/teamInvites.invite with the assigned mixed batch of fresh, duplicate-input, existing-member, and already-pending emails.
steps.expected: The API should create only the fresh invites and return explicit skipped reasons for duplicate, already_member, and already_invited entries.
steps.observed: POST /trpc/teamInvites.invite returned HTTP 200 with payload {"created": [{"id": "b6a45a08-2dfa-4ae5-af3f-39c44a426842", "teamId": "32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802", "email": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-bulk-fresh-a@example.com", "normalizedEmail": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-bulk-fresh-a@example.com", "role": "member", "status": "pending", "invitedByUserId": "Vj3XdZaIqlkw0V9IgV0ZIQiesZybqPud", "acceptedByUserId": null, "expiresAt": "2026-04-13T10:14:40.667Z", "acceptedAt": null, "createdAt": "2026-04-06T10:14:40.910Z", "updatedAt": "2026-04-06T10:14:40.910Z"}, {"id": "69ac6a21-0de8-41ad-aa03-296bc1e8e256", "teamId": "32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802", "email": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-bulk-fresh-b@example.com", "normalizedEmail": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-bulk-fresh-b@example.com", "role": "member", "status": "pending", "invitedByUserId": "Vj3XdZaIqlkw0V9IgV0ZIQiesZybqPud", "acceptedByUserId": null, "expiresAt": "2026-04-13T10:14:40.852Z", "acceptedAt": null, "createdAt": "2026-04-06T10:14:40.910Z", "updatedAt": "2026-04-06T10:14:40.910Z"}], "sent": 2, "skipped": 3, "skippedInvites": [{"email": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-bulk-fresh-a@example.com", "reason": "duplicate"}, {"email": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-mixed-role@example.com", "reason": "already_member"}, {"email": "tenancy-ux-fedb5c00-duplicate-pending@example.com", "reason": "already_invited"}]}.

steps.action: Read GET /trpc/teamInvites.list for the API owner workspace after the bulk mutation.
steps.expected: The pending list should contain exactly one row for each fresh workspace/email pair and no duplicate pending rows for the same workspace/email.

evidence.network: POST /trpc/teamInvites.invite -> 200 with sent=2 skipped=3; GET /trpc/teamInvites.list -> 200 and the pending list contained one row each for the fresh bulk emails on team 32ba831b-8daf-4e8d-a874-ebe34db54802.
